site.name: Vishweshwar Mensumane
site.subtag: Finance Educator · Digital Creator · Tool Builder
site.bio: Finance & Management educator with a passion for making money concepts click. I build interactive simulations, finance games, and learning tools that turn complex ideas into real insights. PhD | UGC NET | MBA | Blogger at Money Vichara.

whatsNew.text: Financial Freedom Escape Room — browser-based finance simulation now live!
Money Vichara Excel Lab launched for MBA students
ForexLab — interactive foreign exchange learning tool now available

teachingTools.name: ForexLab
teachingTools.tagline: Master foreign exchange, step by step
teachingTools.description: ForexLab is an interactive learning tool for foreign exchange concepts. It helps students understand quotations, arbitrage, parity, and hedging through step-by-step solutions, practical scenarios, and decision-focused insights — making complex forex problems simple, intuitive, and exam-ready.

teachingTools.name: Money Vichara Excel Lab
teachingTools.tagline: Learn Excel through real financial decisions
teachingTools.description: An interactive, single-file web tool built for MBA students to learn Excel through real financial decisions — not formula memorisation. Every module connects Excel functions to actual business and finance contexts.

gamesSimulations.name: Financial Freedom — Escape Room
gamesSimulations.tagline: 15 minutes. Real decisions. Can you escape?
gamesSimulations.description: Mission: Financial Freedom — a 15-minute, browser-based escape-room style simulation where participants engage with real-life financial decision scenarios (budgeting, investing, protection, and planning) under time pressure.
